# Product

<!--
Reusable skeleton for the root PRODUCT.md (the strategic "who / what / why" that /impeccable and
every design pass reads). The FILLED version lives at the repo root as PRODUCT.md — edit THAT to
change Baloo's context. Copy this template only to reset from scratch or seed a new doc.
Register is a bare value: `product` or `brand`. Platform is bare: `web` / `ios` / `android` / `adaptive`.
Omit the "Conversion & proof" section entirely for the product register.
-->

## Register

<!-- product | brand -->

## Platform

<!-- web | ios | android | adaptive -->

## Users

[Who they are, their context, the job to be done. Name a primary audience; add a secondary one, or
a surface-vs-user split, only when it genuinely applies.]

## Product Purpose

[What this product does, why it exists, and what success looks like.]

## Positioning

[The single strategic claim every screen reinforces. Not a visual rule, not an anti-reference.]

## Conversion & proof

<!-- BRAND register only — delete this whole section (heading included) for product. -->
- Primary and secondary CTA: [...]
- The line a visitor remembers after 10 seconds: [...]
- Belief ladder: [what they must believe, in order, before the primary CTA]
- Proof on hand: [testimonials, case studies, press, logos — referenced by path]

## Brand Personality

[Voice, tone, a 3-word personality, the emotions the interface should evoke.]

## Anti-references

[What this must NOT look or feel like. Specific bad-example patterns or products to avoid.]

## Design Principles

[3–5 strategic principles derived from the product (e.g. "explain, never judge"). Strategic, not
visual — no "use OKLCH", no colour rules; those belong in DESIGN.md.]

## Accessibility & Inclusion

[WCAG target, known user needs, reduced-motion / colour / input considerations.]
